content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Low volatility with broad participation — Vol: 23.1%, Breadth: 6/8 sectors positive; risk appetite is dominant.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Transportation and Retail & Food are leading on momentum: TAVHL (1W: +9.48% | 1M: +4.82%) ABOVE TREND and SOKM (1W: +8.03% | 1M: -14.74%) RECOVERY, with Energy & Chemicals also strong via TUPRS (1W: +6.13% | 1M: +15.03%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Holding & Investment and Technology & Telecom lag; KCHOL (1W: -0.67% | 1M: +4.39%) CORRECTION and KONTR (1W: -10.07% | 1M: -9.44%) BELOW TREND highlight weakness.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TAVHL (1W: +9.48% | 1M: +4.82%) ABOVE TREND; KRDMD (1W: +8.50% | 1M: +6.12%) ABOVE TREND; SOKM (1W: +8.03% | 1M: -14.74%) RECOVERY; TRALT (1W: +7.06% | 1M: -15.80%) RECOVERY; TUPRS (1W: +6.13% | 1M: +15.03%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: -10.07% | 1M: -9.44%) BELOW TREND; DOHOL (1W: -8.12% | 1M: -2.11%) BELOW TREND; TOASO (1W: -5.54% | 1M: -2.60%) BELOW TREND; FROTO (1W: -4.05% | 1M: -4.44%) BELOW TREND; SISE (1W: -1.96% | 1M: +6.74%) CORRECTION.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Big swings this week: KONTR (1W: -10.07% | 1M: -9.44%) BELOW TREND and DOHOL (1W: -8.12% | 1M: -2.11%) BELOW TREND on the downside; TAVHL (1W: +9.48% | 1M: +4.82%) ABOVE TREND and KRDMD (1W: +8.50% | 1M: +6.12%) ABOVE TREND on the upside.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks showing a short-term rebound but mixed monthly picture: AKBNK (1W: +2.77% | 1M: -9.56%) RECOVERY; GARAN (1W: +4.51% | 1M: -4.62%) RECOVERY; ISCTR (1W: +4.03% | 1M: -7.35%) RECOVERY; HALKB (1W: -0.76% | 1M: -13.95%) BELOW TREND — selectively overweight quality names.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industry mixed with select leaders and clear laggards: KRDMD (1W: +8.50% | 1M: +6.12%) ABOVE TREND and EREGL (1W: +4.66% | 1M: +1.18%) ABOVE TREND versus ARCLK (1W: -0.81% | 1M: -1.62%) BELOW TREND, FROTO (1W: -4.05% | 1M: -4.44%) BELOW TREND and TOASO (1W: -5.54% | 1M: -2.60%) BELOW TREND.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy shows conviction but dispersion: TUPRS (1W: +6.13% | 1M: +15.03%) ABOVE TREND and SASA (1W: +1.72% | 1M: +3.49%) ABOVE TREND lead, while TRALT (1W: +7.06% | 1M: -15.80%) RECOVERY and SISE (1W: -1.96% | 1M: +6.74%) CORRECTION require stock-specific risk control.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-on call: overweight cyclical leaders (Transportation, Energy, select Heavy Industry) and trim Holding & Technology exposure; keep stop discipline on names showing large single-week reversals.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TUPRS (1W: +6.13% | 1M: +15.03%) ABOVE TREND for momentum and oil sensitivity; TAVHL (1W: +9.48% | 1M: +4.82%) ABOVE TREND for continued transport strength; KRDMD (1W: +8.50% | 1M: +6.12%) ABOVE TREND as a heavy-industry leader; KONTR (1W: -10.07% | 1M: -9.44%) BELOW TREND for volatility-driven setups.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Transportation and Energy & Chemicals for upside continuation and catalyst-driven moves; Banking to monitor for confirmation of the recovery in financials.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100’s 20-day momentum and any breakouts above recent swing highs for continuation; monitor CBT policy signals, global risk sentiment, and oil prices as primary catalysts for Energy and broad market direction.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON market with low volatility and broad sector participation; cyclical names are leading while holdings and tech lag. Opportunity: overweight high-conviction cyclical winners (TUPRS, TAVHL, KRDMD); risk: idiosyncratic drawdowns in chokepoint names (KONTR, DOHOL) and any macro shocks that reverse the low-volatility backdrop.
